category_sources: Official ProjectDiscovery Naabu docs describe it as a Go-based port scanning tool for enumerating valid ports.
display_name_sources: Official ProjectDiscovery documentation page title uses Naabu.
docs_sources: ProjectDiscovery docs include running examples and usage guidance for Naabu.
source_facts.homepage is the official ProjectDiscovery Naabu overview docs page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/projectdiscovery/naabu; per instruction, not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official ProjectDiscovery docs list SYN/CONNECT/UDP scans, host discovery, Nmap integration, and multiple output formats.
source_facts.description and executable identify a port-scanning CLI.
